summary: Comprehensive testing of admin dashboard, policy pages, and main page content updates. All 14 requested features tested and verified working correctly.

passed: TEST 1: Admin login page structure - username/password fields and sign in button present
TEST 2: Invalid credentials show error message 'Invalid credentials. Please try again.'
TEST 3: Valid login (admin/TheBecoming@2026) - Dashboard shows Sign-up Submissions: 14, Contact Messages: 7
TEST 4: Expand signup row - Questionnaire responses visible (What Brings You, Current Phase, Seeking Growth, etc.)
TEST 5: Contacts tab - Contact messages listed with name, email, date
TEST 6: Logout functionality - Returns to login page
TEST 7: /refund-policy page - Contains 'Registration & Seat Confirmation' and '50% refund'
TEST 8: /privacy-policy page - Contains 'Information We Collect' and 'Data Protection'
TEST 9: /terms-of-use page - Contains 'Acceptance of Terms' and 'Use of Website'
TEST 10: /cookie-policy page - Contains 'What Are Cookies' and 'Cookies We Use'
TEST 11: Footer contains all policy links (Refund Policy, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Cookie Policy)
TEST 12: Contact email is 'enter@thebecoming.in' (no old email present)
TEST 13: No em dashes (—) found on main page
TEST 14: 'Not a Networking Event' section contains 'not just another networking event' text
TEST 15: Footer Refund Policy link navigates correctly
TEST 16: Footer Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Cookie Policy links all navigate correctly

details.login_page: Username/password fields present with Sign In button
details.valid_login: Dashboard accessible with correct counts (14 signups, 7 contacts)
details.signup_expansion: Questionnaire responses visible when row expanded
details.logout: Returns to login page and clears session

pages.refund-policy: Contains Registration & Seat Confirmation, 50% refund, Refund Eligibility
pages.privacy-policy: Contains Information We Collect, Data Protection, Data Sharing
pages.terms-of-use: Contains Acceptance of Terms, Use of Website, Application Process
pages.cookie-policy: Contains What Are Cookies, Cookies We Use, Managing Cookies

footer_links.navigation: All links navigate correctly to respective pages

em_dash_removal.details: No em dash characters (—) found on main page

networking_event_text.details: 'Not a Networking Event' section contains 'not just another networking event'

seed_data_creation: None - existing data used (14 signups, 7 contacts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard at /admin with hardcoded credentials (admin/TheBecoming@2026). Policy pages at /refund-policy, /privacy-policy, /terms-of-use, /cookie-policy. Footer links use regular <a> tags. All data-testid attributes in place for admin (admin-login-form, admin-username, admin-password, admin-login-btn, signup-count, contact-count, tab-signups, tab-contacts, logout-btn, signup-row-{n}, contact-row-{n}).
